replies.author: @Saraameo
replies.text:
~177,941,750 is the number of people killed in wars attributed to Christian states, while the number attributed to Islamic states is ~ 31,943,500 (The study Body Count: A Quantitative Review of Political Violence Across World Civilizations states)
.
The Spanish “Requerimiento” (1513):
An official document that conquistadors read to the Indigenous peoples of the Americas. It was directly inspired by Deuteronomy 20:10–14 (offer peace first, then kill the men and take the women and children captive as spoils). It stated:
.
> “We ask you… to acknowledge the Church and the King… otherwise we will wage war against you… and we will take your women and children as slaves.”

It was used during the conquest of Mexico and Peru and led to mass killings, enslavement, and the complete destruction of the populations of entire cities. The Massacre of Jerusalem in 1099 is often cited as a clear example. It involved forced conversion to Christianity, slavery and enslavement, the capture and sale of Indigenous people—including women, children, and men—the seizure of property as war booty, the killing of Indigenous men, and the plundering of lands and wealth.
 Jesus said✝️
“Do not think that I came to bring peace on earth? I did not come to bring peace, but a sword.”(Matthew 10:34)
“For I have come to set a man against his father, and a daughter against her mother.”(Matthew 10:35–36)
.
Egyptian Coptic Christians were GRATEFUL for MUSLIMS ruling them because they were humiliated and r@ped by the romans as the Orthodox Coptic historian (YAQOUB BEY NAKHLA RUFAILA 1847-1908) wrote in his book (History of the Coptic nation) I quote
"the Coptic (Egyptian) Christian would stand outside the house until the Roman finished (RAPING) his wife and daughters, then he would go to the field to bring him food and heat water for him, and he would not be able to object (because of the difference in belief between the Copts and the Romans in the nature of Christ) until the Muslim Arabs came from the Arabian Peninsula and changed the situation, and the Roman would leave his money and family as spoils for the Copts and flee the country after God had honored them with the entry of the Muslim Arabs"
into their country as liberators" in the seventh century
.
Historian and political scientist Dr. Roy Casagranda said that in the year 711 CE, Muslims made up about 10% of the population of the Umayyad state. At that time 70% of the world’s Christians lived within the Umayyad state.This means that most Christians around the world then lived in an Islamic state whose population was predominantly Christian.
In light of this simple fact, the empty claim that “Islam spread by the sword” collapses
Christians in the same state accounted for 70% of the population
